headline: Retail giant Walmart issues economic warning
summary: Walmart tops all retailers in the United States when it comes to sales, according to data from Capital One. The retail giant's $675.6 billion in global sales was almost twice as much as second-place Amazon, which came in at $394.1 billion in 2024 sales data. Walmart’s international-only (i.e., ...

headline: Goodbye Bull Market, Hello Recession
summary: Recession risks rise as the Sahm Rule triggers and GDP slows; SPY/QQQ test support while cyclicals plunge.
